question: How much of your study time is taken up by extracurricular activities each week?
How often do you feel behind on academic work because of extracurricular commitments?
How difficult is it to complete assignments on time while maintaining extracurricular involvement?
How often do you sacrifice study sessions to attend extracurricular activities?
How often do you feel overwhelmed trying to keep up with both academic and extracurricular demands?
How frequently do extracurricular activities improve your mood and reduce academic tension?
How often do you feel guilty for spending time on extracurricular activities instead of studying?
How often do you feel a sense of purpose or achievement through extracurricular participation?
How often do extracurricular activities cause you to reduce your sleep hours?
How frequently do you feel physically worn out during class due to extracurricular activities?
How often do you feel energized or refreshed after engaging in extracurricular activities?
How often do you struggle to focus on studying due to mental fatigue from extracurricular activities?
How frequently do you feel your academic results have suffered due to extracurricular involvement?
How often do extracurricular activities sharpen your focus or discipline when studying?
How often do you feel pressured to perform well in both academics and extracurricular activities?
How often do your extracurricular peers help you cope with academic stress?
How frequently do you use extracurricular activities as a healthy mental break from studies?
How often do you feel socially disconnected when you cut back on extracurriculars during exams?
How often do you feel the balance between extracurricular and academic life is within your control?
How confident are you that extracurricular involvement will positively affect your university experience?
